title: Astray's Horror Modpack
description: Lightweight, optimized horror modpack with over 200 mods designed to run on anything
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d11f88103342ec46a0fd3d4fc394b2fe35b69c4.png)

![Welcome (Dark mode only)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e752c2ee6ac21bc469426d351deffeddf9b520fc_0.webp)

**Astray's Horror Modpack** is a thrilling horror expirence designed to give the user a sense of fear unlike any other modpack has.
You may ask what it has to offer or "What makes it so scary" well, in this modpack you
will encounter various elements of horror, it is a hybrid of slow-burn and fast horror, it has mods such as "The Broken Script". 
You will find many things to do in this modpack such as uncover the lore in The Broken Script and more to come later in your playthrough

![marketing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c53442bc335fb6f52a07f34ce934e72816ad88a7.png)

___
Q&A
___

Q: Is there blood?

A: Yes.

Q: Will it give me nightmares?

A: You bet.

Q: Is it safe for my computer?

A: Of course!

Q: Do you have a YouTube?

A: Sure it's @astraykitty

Q: Should I play it?

A: You should! It's a great idea :D

______________________________
FEATURES
______________________________

- Scary gameplay
- Tons of mods
- Fun with friends (But buggy due to The Broken Script)
- Social Mods (Essential Mod)
- Horror-type hybrid gameplay

**_> "I can't sleep now, I feel like there is something watching me in real life" -- Anonymous Friend 1_**


**_> "I am terrified, 10/10" -- subarugreed_**

Credits: Complementrary

Thanks for downloading my modpack, I hope you enjoy :3
